summary: Doc build failed while converting llama.md to MDX because a Python SyntaxError occurred when importing transformers.modeling_utils due to unresolved merge conflict markers in the source.
root_cause: A Python SyntaxError was raised during import of transformers.modeling_utils because the file contains unresolved git merge conflict markers ('<<<<<<< sonic-moe'), causing the doc-builder to fail converting ../transformers/docs/source/en/model_doc/llama.md to MDX.

evidence.reason: Shows a Python syntax error occurred and is the immediate failure reason.
Presence of a git merge conflict marker inside the Python file indicates unresolved merge conflict causing invalid syntax.
Locates the syntax error inside transformers/modeling_utils.py at the indicated line.

evidence.quote: There was an error when converting ../transformers/docs/source/en/model_doc/llama.md to the MDX format.
evidence.reason: The doc-builder failed converting the llama documentation file due to the import/syntax error.
Shows modeling_utils is being imported, which triggered the SyntaxError during the import chain.

suggested_fix: Open transformers/modeling_utils.py, remove or resolve the unresolved git merge conflict markers (e.g. '<<<<<<< sonic-moe' and corresponding '======='/'>>>>>>>'), ensure the file is valid Python, commit the fix, and re-run the doc build.
